ab: miakuza ihu ya mutusi talhuqan?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: patungbarimbin iaku mutantu talhuqan.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: miakuza thithu ya mutusi mriqariqaz shiz a taun?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: mundadaan thithu ya mutusi mriqariqaz shiz a taun.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: miakuza ihu ya mutusi Ping-huu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: milhungqu iaku sa marfarfaz a barimbin ya mutusi Ping-huu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: miakuza ihu ya mutusi Ping-huu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: munruza iaku ya mutusi Ping-huu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: numa wa barimbin milhungqu ihu ya mutaun?
en: How do you go home?

ab: milhungqu iaku sa mabiskaw a barimbin ya mutaun.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: numa s barimbin milhungqu Shuni ya mutusi lhupilhupishan a taun?
en: How does Shuni go to school?

ab: Shuni milhungqu sa apuy a barimbin ya mutusi lhupilhupishan a taun.
en: Shuni goes to school by train.

ab: numa s barimbin milhungqu Hudun ya mutusi balinuqaz a taun?
en: How does Hudun go to church?

ab: kmangktha Hudun kangqthaan a barimbin ya mutusi balinuqaz a taun.
en: Hudun goes to church by bicycle.

ab: milhungqu ihu sa mabiskaw a barimbin ya mutusi malhupish?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: ani, milhungqu iaku sa ba-su a barimbin ya mutusi malhupish.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: kmangqtha ihu kangqthaan a barimbin ya musui malhupish?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ua, kmangqtha iaku sa kangqthaan a barimbin ya musui malhupish.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: milhungqu ihu sa lamabiskaw maquliush a barimbin ya mutusi Kau-shiung?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ua, milhungqu iaku sa lamabiskaw maquliush a barimbin ya mutusi Kau-shiung.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: ihu ya mutusi Tai-taang milhungqu sa apuy a barimbin numa ya marfarfaz a barimbin?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: milhungqu iaku sa marfarfaz a barimbin, maqa milhungqu marfarfaz a barimbin mabiskaw mat apuy a barimbin.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: ihu ya mutusi balinuqaz a taun milhungqu sa basu a barimbin numa ya patungbarimbin?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: patungbarimbin iaku ya mutusi balinuqaz a taun, maqa patungbarimbin maqitan ya mat milhungqu sa basu a barimbin.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: farifariwan makitqualh sa mihu a taun qa?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: antu iqualh, matung’u-tu-bai iaku ya mutantu farifariwan.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: yu-kiuq makitqualh sa lhupilhupishan a taun qa?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: iqualh, ya mundadaan ashaunatantuiza.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: kmaan afu a taun makitqualh sa ia’ianan milhungqu a barimbin a taun qa?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: ya mu’apaw sa ia’ianan milhungqu a barimbin a taun uqthawan mundadaan larima wa qumbu ashaunatantuiza.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
